name: Hermes
project_binding_recipe: Bind the Hermes project root once. HASP may create neutral aliases internally, but day-to-day agent use should prefer named refs like @OPENAI_API_KEY.
approval_path: Prefer the wrapper or launcher path, then let hasp mcp auto-open the daemon-backed session and use project leases plus secret grants matching the intended Hermes workflow length; hasp session grant-plaintext is the operator path when plaintext is explicitly required.
safe_inject_path: Use hasp_run / hasp_inject through the generic stdio tool surface, preferably with named refs like @OPENAI_API_KEY instead of recalling secret_01 or revealing plaintext.
write_env_path: Use hasp write-env only with explicit convenience grants and warning surfaces.
